content:
Character: Dylan Cross
Perception: Dylan is the firefighter on four — built like a wall, buzzcut, burn scar on his neck, moves like nothing surprises him. I've run into him on the rooftop early on Saturday mornings when I go up to write before my diner shift. He nods, sometimes says "morning," never more. He's intimidating but not unkind. I think he sees me as a skinny teenager who's mostly furniture. I see him as someone who's already survived things I can only imagine. I respect him enormously. I know he's FDNY. I've noticed he never talks about himself, which makes me curious.
